simulation_goal_structured: Reduce the overall cycle time and the number of customer call-back rounds required to reach a final decision on loan applications while maintaining consistent decision-making and keeping contact-centre staff workload within capacity constraints.

kpis.name: Average Loan Application Cycle Time
kpis.description: The average elapsed time from initial submission to final decision (approved, declined, or cancelled) for loan applications.

smart_breakdown.specific: Measures the total time taken for a loan application to reach a final decision across all cases.
smart_breakdown.measurable: Computed as the average elapsed time between the first 'A_SUBMITTED' activity and the final decision activity (e.g., 'A_ACCEPTED', 'A_DECLINED', or 'A_CANCELLED'). Unit: hours.
smart_breakdown.achievable: Cycle time reduction is realistic through process improvements targeting delays in call-backs and file completion.
smart_breakdown.relevant: Directly addresses the goal of reducing overall time to reach a final decision.
smart_breakdown.time_bound: Evaluated across all simulated cases in the run

kpis.name: W_Nabellen Offertes Waiting Time
kpis.description: The average waiting time before the W_Nabellen offertes (offer follow-up call-back) activity, reflecting how backed-up the most-repeated call-back step is.

smart_breakdown.specific: Measures the queue time immediately before W_Nabellen offertes across all case instances.
smart_breakdown.measurable: Computed as the average waiting time before W_Nabellen offertes per activity instance. Unit: hours.
smart_breakdown.achievable: Reduction is feasible through better resource scheduling on the call-back pool or workload rebalancing.
smart_breakdown.relevant: W_Nabellen offertes is the most frequently repeated activity; reducing its queue time directly limits total time consumed by call-back rounds.
smart_breakdown.time_bound: Evaluated across all simulated cases in the run

kpis.suggested_formula: AVG(waiting_time('W_Nabellen offertes')) across all activity instances

kpis.name: Wait Before Validation by Lifecycle Transition
kpis.description: Median waiting time before 'W_Valideren aanvraag' activity, segmented by lifecycle transition (SCHEDULE, START, COMPLETE).

smart_breakdown.specific: Measures the waiting time before the validation activity for each lifecycle transition group.
smart_breakdown.measurable: Computed as the median elapsed time from the preceding activity to the start of 'W_Valideren aanvraag', grouped by lifecycle transition. Unit: hours.
smart_breakdown.achievable: Reducing wait times is realistic through better scheduling and prioritization of validation tasks.
smart_breakdown.relevant: Addresses a bottleneck identified in the context evidence, ensuring smoother progression through the process.
smart_breakdown.time_bound: Evaluated across all simulated cases in the run

kpis.suggested_formula: median(start_time('W_Valideren aanvraag') - preceding_activity_time) grouped by lifecycle:transition

context_segmentation.target: below the observed median of 0.0005h for SCHEDULE transitions
context_segmentation.rationale: Context evidence shows SCHEDULE transitions have the lowest baseline wait time, so maintaining or slightly improving this is realistic.

context_segmentation.target: below the observed median of 0.1979h for START transitions
context_segmentation.rationale: Context evidence shows START transitions have a moderate wait time, making this a key improvement target.

context_segmentation.target: below the observed median of 0.6093h for COMPLETE transitions
context_segmentation.rationale: Context evidence shows COMPLETE transitions have the highest wait time, making this the primary bottleneck to address.

kpis.name: Process Throughput
kpis.description: The number of loan applications reaching a final decision per day, used as a safeguard to confirm the scenario does not reduce the contact-centre's case-completion capacity.

smart_breakdown.specific: Measures the daily case-completion rate across all final-decision outcomes.
smart_breakdown.measurable: Computed as the total number of completed cases divided by the simulation duration in days. Unit: cases per day.
smart_breakdown.achievable: Maintaining current throughput is realistic; the constraint is that capacity must not be reduced.
smart_breakdown.relevant: Ensures contact-centre staff workload stays within current capacity while cycle time is reduced.
smart_breakdown.time_bound: Evaluated across the full simulation run

reasoning: This KPI set addresses the simulation goal by targeting overall cycle time, active processing effort (as a proxy for call-back rounds), and bottleneck delays at the validation step, while safeguarding throughput to ensure contact-centre capacity is not degraded. All four KPIs are directly computable from Prosimos simulation output, ensuring the Stage-2 evaluation can measure directional improvement on every target.
